final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 3x3 character expression grid for Zhao Ling'er (赵灵儿) from the Legend of Sword and Fairy (仙剑奇侠传) IP.

Style/medium: 3D animation, Pixar-style character design, clean stylized CGI with soft subsurface scattering on skin
Composition: 3x3 grid layout with 9 equal square panels, each panel showing a bust portrait view, consistent head size and positioning across all panels, characters peeking through torn holes in white paper as the unifying framing device
Subject: young woman with voluminous dark wavy hair and round wire-rimmed glasses, Zhao Ling'er inspired appearance with traditional Chinese beauty elements merged with modern casual fashion
Scene/backdrop: plain white paper background with torn circular/irregular holes, negative space emphasis, minimal environmental distraction
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting from upper left, gentle shadows, warm and friendly atmosphere, consistent across all 9 panels
Color palette: varied outfit colors per panel (green, red, yellow, black/white, orange, blue, purple, pink, teal) as accent against neutral white paper base
Materials/textures: smooth Pixar-style skin, fabric textures for sweaters/jackets/hoodies, matte paper with torn fibrous edges, slight translucency on hair strands
Constraints: must maintain character likeness across all 9 expressions; each panel must show distinct expression and action as specified; torn paper holes must be consistent size and style
Avoid: photorealistic skin pores, anime/cel-shaded style, inconsistent character proportions between panels, generic stock photo aesthetic, 8K stuffer language

Panel specifications (verbatim from query):
- top-left: winking, adjusting glasses, green sweater
- top-center: smirking, lowering dark sunglasses, red leather jacket
- top-right: thinking, finger on chin, yellow hoodie
- middle-left: big smile, arms resting on edge, black and white striped shirt
- middle-center: smiling, thumbs up, orange button-up shirt
- middle-right: neutral, drinking boba tea, blue sweater
- bottom-left: happy, waving, purple sweater vest over white shirt
- bottom-center: laughing with eyes closed, arms crossed, pink cardigan
- bottom-right: silly, poking cheeks, teal sweater
